Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I'm afraid... I might have to go back home soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}The only reason I was able to come here was because of my aunt.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}But my uncle did not agree with the decision![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}"Get home now! Maintenant!" Is he my uncle or the mafia?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}If I do return home, back to my uncle...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I might never come back to Japan again![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 60 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Japan is where I want to be! I want to learn everything about it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I want to dedicate my life to learning everything about Japan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Except, it does not matter what I say to him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I cannot afford to live here without my uncle's help.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}And I have gotten to know you well, {f 4 2}-dono.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I cannot simply say, "See you later," and leave you like this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I cannot simply say, "Peace out," and leave you like this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I cannot simply say, "Until we meet again," and leave you like this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I cannot simply say, "I'll be back," and leave you like this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bebe shared the troubles on his mind.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're growing closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}It's almost time to say, "See you later."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}It's almost time to say, "Peace out."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}It's almost time to say, "Until we meet again."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}It's almost time to say, "I'll be back."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Then I'll see you at the club sometime![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Bebe[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
